notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes grounds into a double play, first baseman Paul Goldschmidt to shortstop Anthony Volpe to pitcher Will Warren. George Springer out at 2nd. Nathan Lukes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to second baseman José Caballero to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Nathan Lukes to 3rd. Alejandro Kirk out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to second baseman José Caballero to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Nathan Lukes to 3rd. Alejandro Kirk out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto singles on a ground ball to third baseman Amed Rosario. Nathan Lukes scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw pops out to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Braydon Fisher. Paul Goldschmidt to 2nd. Paul Goldschmidt advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Braydon Fisher.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto singles on a ground ball to third baseman Amed Rosario. Nathan Lukes scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto singles on a ground ball to third baseman Amed Rosario. Nathan Lukes scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Jazz Chisholm Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jazz Chisholm Jr. walks. Jasson Domínguez to 2nd.
